OSPS-AC-01.01_justification:
The single maintainer's GitHub account has 2FA enabled (TOTP + hardware key). GitHub also enforces 2FA for every account touching this repo.

Evidence: https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/securing-your-account-with-two-factor-authentication-2fa
OSPS-AC-02.01_justification: GitHub's default: new collaborators inherit no repo permissions unless explicitly granted. This repo has no external collaborators — only the single maintainer.
OSPS-AC-03.01_justification:
Repository ruleset 17924860 enforces no direct commits and no non-fast-forward on the default branch. See Rules → Ruleset settings.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/rules
OSPS-AC-03.02_justification:
Same ruleset also prevents deletion of the default branch.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/rules
OSPS-AC-04.01_justification:
Every workflow declares an explicit least-privilege permissions: block (e.g. release.yml grants only contents/id-token/attestations/packages: write; ci.yml grants contents: read).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/tree/main/.github/workflows
OSPS-AC-04.02_justification:
Every actions/* invocation is pinned to a commit SHA with a trailing version comment; verified by OpenSSF Scorecard PinnedDependenciesID check (zero open alerts).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/security/code-scanning
OSPS-BR-01.01_justification:
Every release commit and merge commit is cryptographically signed (SSH ed25519). Ruleset requires signed commits.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/commits/main
OSPS-BR-01.03_justification:
Release artifacts (tarballs, .deb, .rpm) carry SLSA v1.0 provenance via actions/attest-build-provenance since v0.0.11. Verify: gh attestation verify <file> --repo sebastienrousseau/corral.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/releases/tag/v0.0.11
OSPS-BR-01.04_justification:
The Docker image at ghcr.io/sebastienrousseau/corral is signed by cosign in keyless mode (OIDC identity). Verify: cosign verify --certificate-identity-regexp='https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/.github/workflows/release.yml@refs/tags/.*' --certificate-oidc-issuer=https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com ghcr.io/sebastienrousseau/corral:0.0.11.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/pkgs/container/corral
OSPS-BR-02.01_justification:
Semantic Versioning: tags v0.0.7 → v0.0.11 follow semver 2.0.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/releases
OSPS-BR-02.02_justification:
Every release asset is tagged with the semver version in its filename (corralctl_0.0.11_linux_amd64.deb, etc.) and each is SLSA-attested + cosign-signed.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/releases/tag/v0.0.11
OSPS-BR-03.01_justification:
Release build is fully automated via GoReleaser on tag push. See .github/workflows/release.yml.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.github/workflows/release.yml
OSPS-BR-03.02_justification:
Base Docker image is SHA-pinned (FROM alpine:3.20@sha256:d9e853…4b6bc). Every Actions dep in every workflow is SHA-pinned. Go module dependencies are lock-verified via go.sum.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/Dockerfile
OSPS-BR-04.01_justification:
All release automation runs in an ephemeral GitHub-hosted runner (fresh VM per job). No stateful build servers.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.github/workflows/release.yml
OSPS-BR-05.01_justification:
Release outputs are static: .tar.gz, .deb, .rpm, and an OCI image with byte-reproducible layers. GoReleaser's release.mode:replace guarantees deterministic artifact set per tag.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.goreleaser.yaml
OSPS-BR-06.01_justification:
CHANGELOG.md follows Keep a Changelog and semver. Every release since v0.0.7 has a dated section with Added/Changed/Fixed/Security groupings.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
OSPS-BR-07.01_justification:
gitleaks/dependency-review runs on every PR; goreleaser strips debug symbols; no secrets are ever committed (env vars used for HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN, AUR_KEY). Zero secret-scanning alerts.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/security/secret-scanning
OSPS-BR-07.02_justification:
Secrets policy: only three secrets used (GITHUB_TOKEN, HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN, AUR_KEY), all repo-scoped GitHub Secrets, rotated on personnel change (documented in SECURITY.md).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/SECURITY.md
OSPS-DO-01.01_justification:
README.md documents install, quick-start, architecture (mermaid diagram), features, MCP server, examples, troubleshooting, and FAQ.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/README.md
OSPS-DO-02.01_justification:
CONTRIBUTING.md documents fork/branch/PR flow, signed-commit requirement, dev deps (Go 1.26+, Make, Git), and the make target for verification.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
OSPS-DO-03.01_justification:
Public API is documented as GoDoc for every exported symbol. Doc coverage is gated at 100% in CI via scripts/doc_coverage.go (currently 56/56).

Evidence: https://doc.corrallib.com
OSPS-DO-03.02_justification:
README quick-start section documents build-from-source, Homebrew, AUR, .deb/.rpm, Docker, and Go install paths.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/README.md#install
OSPS-DO-04.01_justification:
SECURITY.md documents the private disclosure email, supported versions, and 90-day coordinated disclosure timeline.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/SECURITY.md
OSPS-DO-05.01_justification:
SBOM.md documents runtime deps with versions and licenses; go.mod/go.sum are the canonical machine-readable source.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/SBOM.md
OSPS-DO-06.01_justification:
LICENSE is GPL-3.0 (OSI-approved). The file is at the repo root, referenced in README and every release archive.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/LICENSE
OSPS-DO-07.01_justification:
README's 'MCP Server' section explicitly documents safety posture: read-only tools by default, path-traversal defence via canonicalisation, --enable-mutations gating for any future write tools.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/README.md#mcp-server-for-ai-agents
OSPS-GV-01.01_justification:
GPL-3.0, an OSI-approved and FSF-approved license. Full text at repo root.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/LICENSE
OSPS-GV-01.02_justification:
Single-maintainer project; roles documented as 'maintainer = decision-maker' in CONTRIBUTING.md's PR flow.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
OSPS-GV-02.01_justification:
Single-maintainer project — governance model is 'benevolent dictator' with the maintainer documented in CONTRIBUTING.md and the release AUR/Homebrew configs.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
OSPS-GV-03.01_justification:
Every merged PR is reviewable at github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/pulls?state=closed. Merge commits are signed and preserved in main's history.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aclosed
OSPS-GV-03.02_justification:
CONTRIBUTING.md documents PR review flow: fork → branch → PR → signed-commit requirement → make test/build/format → maintainer merge.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
OSPS-GV-04.01_justification:
Repo is public (readable without account). Complete git history from initial commit.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral
OSPS-LE-01.01_justification:
GPL-3.0 (OSI-approved) at LICENSE. SPDX identifier declared in .goreleaser.yaml and per-package metadata (deb/rpm/homebrew).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/LICENSE
OSPS-LE-02.01_justification:
Only permissive/copyleft dependencies used; all listed in go.mod. No CLA-encumbered libraries.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/go.mod
OSPS-LE-02.02_justification:
GPL-3.0 is OSI-approved and FSF-approved; text at LICENSE, SPDX identifier declared in .goreleaser.yaml and all downstream package configs.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/LICENSE
OSPS-LE-03.01_justification:
No CLA required. Contributions are inbound=outbound under GPL-3.0 per the CONTRIBUTING.md flow (implicit inbound license by contribution).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
OSPS-LE-03.02_justification: No proprietary code is imported into the project.
OSPS-QA-01.01_justification:
Automated test suite runs on every PR via .github/workflows/ci.yml (Ubuntu + macOS + Windows). Also run via `make test-race`.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/actions/workflows/ci.yml
OSPS-QA-01.02_justification:
Full git history is public and readable at github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral — every commit signed, no force-pushes to main (ruleset non_fast_forward), no history rewrites.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/commits/main
OSPS-QA-02.01_justification:
Test coverage: 90.2% of statements as of v0.0.11. Per-package: git 95.3%, mcp 90.1%, engine 90.1%, tui 87.4%, github 90.8%, cmd 91.0%.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci.yml
OSPS-QA-02.02_justification:
Every release artifact is either a compiled binary from the pinned Docker base or a Go binary from a reproducible toolchain (Go 1.26.1 pinned in goreleaser).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.goreleaser.yaml
OSPS-QA-03.01_justification:
`go vet ./...` runs on every PR (docs-check job) plus `-race` on every merged PR. Any warning fails CI.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci.yml
OSPS-QA-04.01_justification:
New features consistently ship with tests. Recent PRs demonstrate: PR #35 added 7 tests for cmd/mcp.go + 17 for matchesFilters; PR #33 added 5 for MCP hardening.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Aclosed
OSPS-QA-04.02_justification: Corral is a single-repository project; no cross-repo release coordination applies.
OSPS-QA-05.01_justification:
CI blocks merges when tests fail. Required status check 'Go CI / Check & Test' is a merge gate (see repo branch protection).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci.yml
OSPS-QA-05.02_justification:
Repository contains only source files, YAML configs, and .gif demo (reviewable). Binaries (corralctl, dist/) are gitignored. Verified via .gitignore.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/.gitignore
OSPS-QA-06.01_justification:
Code style enforced via `make format` (gofmt) and `make lint` (golangci-lint). Documented in CONTRIBUTING.md.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
OSPS-QA-06.02_justification:
CONTRIBUTING.md documents: `make test`, `make test-race`, `make build`, `make lint`, `make format`. CI runs all of them on every PR.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
OSPS-QA-06.03_justification:
CHANGELOG's per-release sections document every behaviour-changing PR since v0.0.6. Breaking changes are called out (e.g. Pull signature change in v0.0.7).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
OSPS-QA-07.01_justification:
Public API is documented via GoDoc; every exported symbol has a doc comment (100% doc coverage gate).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/scripts/doc_coverage.go
OSPS-SA-01.01_justification:
CodeQL runs on every PR via .github/workflows/security.yml, covering Go source. Zero open alerts.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/security/code-scanning
OSPS-SA-02.01_justification:
gosec runs on every PR (Security / Go Security Audit job). Zero open findings.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/actions/workflows/security.yml
OSPS-SA-03.01_justification:
Dependency Review action runs on every PR (Security / Dependency Review job) — flags CVEs in new/changed deps before merge.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/actions/workflows/security.yml
OSPS-SA-03.02_justification: Formal threat modeling document not yet produced. Ad-hoc threat model documented in the MCP Safety section of README (read-only default, path-traversal defence, sandboxed root). Candidate for a future security-model.md.
OSPS-VM-01.01_justification:
SECURITY.md documents the private disclosure channel (email) and asks reporters to not open public issues.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/SECURITY.md
OSPS-VM-02.01_justification:
SECURITY.md documents the 90-day coordinated disclosure timeline and initial-response commitment.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/SECURITY.md
OSPS-VM-03.01_justification:
GitHub Dependabot alerts are enabled repo-wide. Zero open alerts on main.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/security/dependabot
OSPS-VM-04.01_justification:
Dependency upgrade cycle is automated: Dependabot opens PRs on new CVEs; historical merges include #21 (setup-go 6.4→6.5), #34 (Dockerfile digest pin).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/pulls?q=is%3Apr+dependabot
OSPS-VM-04.02_justification:
CHANGELOG's [Security] group in v0.0.11 and v0.0.8 documents every security-relevant change since v0.0.6.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
OSPS-VM-05.01_justification:
GitHub Security Advisories interface is enabled and the maintainer can publish CVEs from it. No advisories to date.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/security/advisories
OSPS-VM-05.02_justification:
SCA violations policy: Dependency Review action fails the PR on new CVEs; Dependabot alerts trigger a follow-up PR within 7 days per SECURITY.md.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/blob/main/SECURITY.md
OSPS-VM-05.03_justification:
Every PR is automatically evaluated by Dependency Review (dep changes) + CodeQL (source changes) + gosec (Go-specific). Zero open findings.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/security
OSPS-VM-06.01_justification:
Vulnerabilities affecting supported versions get a fix release. See PR #34 (Dockerfile pin fixed scanner alert #25 on the release train).

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/pull/34
OSPS-VM-06.02_justification:
Every PR passes through the same automated evaluation as main (CI required checks), so a fix release cannot regress a scanned vulnerability without CI failing.

Evidence: https://github.com/sebastienrousseau/corral/actions
